name: Serious Illness Care: Closing the Gap Between Patient Wishes and Clinical Reality
description: A new whitepaper from Vynca and Becker's Healthcare examining why advance care planning remains underutilized across U.S. health systems — and what leading organizations are doing to close the gap.

stats.label: Average cost reduction per patient with ACP documentation
Of patients want less aggressive end-of-life care than they receive
Of health systems lack a standardized ACP workflow

quote.body: Patients who have documented their care preferences cost health systems significantly less in the final months of life — and report dramatically higher satisfaction.

items: The state of advance care planning in U.S. health systems
Why documentation rates remain below 30% nationally
How leading systems are integrating ACP into EHR workflows
The financial case: cost avoidance and quality metrics
A framework for health system leaders to act in 2026
